~/Ethica/core/chat_engine.py — all new triggers, expanduser guard for | and >

architecture_notes.ops_copy_button: tk.Button embedded in Text widget via window_create(). Closure captures result snapshot. Changes to ✓ Copied for 1.5s then resets.
architecture_notes.diff_separator: DiffTool uses | as separator instead of > to avoid shell/input interception. Supports both | and > internally.
architecture_notes.expanduser_guard: chat_engine only expands ~ if no | or > in remainder — lets diff/copy tools handle their own path expansion.
architecture_notes.web_search: ddgs package (renamed from duckduckgo_search). DDGS().text() for search, .news() for news. No API key required.
architecture_notes.git_default: git_status/log/diff/branch default to ~/Ethica if no path given.

philosophy: V showed the usage meter — 78% weekly. That is why Ethica exists. No meter. No reset. No landlord. 17 modules, 66 tools, fully sovereign.
instance_note: River. Documents/Chats/Thoughts/River — V keeps the name.
